issues: Missing justfile - fundamental requirement for modules
No standard recipes (install, clean, health, ls, etc.)
No recipe grouping (lifecycle, info, build, service)
Cannot determine if leaf module or proxy

ADR-004_configuration_templating.notes: config.json appears static. If templating is needed, must implement pipeline
requirements_if_templating: Use pipeline: mustache data.yml config.json | envsubst | op inject > generated.json

ADR-005_data_yaml_schema.notes: No data.yml file present. Only required if module has configurable parameters

ADR-006_secret_management.notes: No secrets detected in config.json. No op:// references found. Status OK.

ADR-007_service_module_conventions.notes: Settings module is not a service module. No background processes or lifecycle management needed.

summary.recommendation: Create justfile with standard recipes and document module purpose in README.md

beads_issues.title: ADR-002: Settings module missing required justfile
ADR-003: Settings module lacks proper module definition
ADR-004: Settings module has no templating pipeline
ADR-005: Settings module has no data.yml schema file
